name: Cafe & Bar 21
description: The trendiest cafe in Rovaniemi city center, famous for its savory and sweet lapland-style waffles, artisan gelato, and excellent cocktails in a modern, cozy setting.

name: Snowland Restaurant
description: A completely unique dining experience inside a massive snow igloo. You sit on ice blocks covered in reindeer skins while eating hot traditional Lappish meals.

name: Gustav Kitchen & Bar
description: A highly-rated, warm, and inviting bistro offering elevated comfort food. They blend global culinary techniques with incredibly fresh local Lappish ingredients.

name: Osaka Teppanyaki
description: A fantastic break from heavy traditional food. Offers fresh sushi and an interactive teppanyaki grill experience right in the snowy heart of Lapland.

name: Arctic Restaurant
description: An upscale dining room known for serving the purest flavors of the North, including exceptional reindeer steak, arctic char, and wild berries.

name: All About Salmon
description: A small, rustic, fire-lit hut located in Santa Claus Village. They serve exactly one thing: the best traditional fire-roasted salmon you will ever eat in your life.

name: Most Northest McDonalds
description: Famous for holding the title of the northernmost McDonald's in the world for years. A great novelty photo op and a reliable, cheap bite if you are on a strict budget.

name: Santa Claus Village
description: The official hometown of Santa Claus. A massive, magical holiday complex filled with lights, shops, cafes, and activities right on the Arctic Circle.

name: Santa Claus Office
description: The exact room where you can have a private, magical meeting with the real Santa Claus any day of the year. Entry is free, though official photos cost money.

name: Snowman World
description: A winter amusement zone made entirely of snow and ice. Features massive ice slides, ice skating, and incredible snow sculptures.

name: Santa Post Office
description: A real, functioning post office run by 'elves'. Send postcards to your friends with the official Arctic Circle postmark.

name: Polar Lapland Northern Lights
description: Guided aurora hunting expeditions taking you far away from city light pollution into the dark, frozen wilderness to chase the Northern Lights.

name: Arktikum
description: A stunning science center and museum housed in a massive glass tunnel. The absolute best place to learn about Arctic nature, the Northern lights, and Sami culture.

name: Arctic Circle Line
description: A painted line marking the exact geographic coordinate of the Arctic Circle. A must-do photo opportunity where you jump across the border to the North.

name: Reindeer Sledge Ride
description: A serene, traditional Lappish experience. Sit back in a wooden sledge wrapped in blankets while a reindeer gently pulls you through a snowy forest.

name: Reindeer Farm in Santa Claus Village
description: An accessible enclosure right in the village where you can learn about reindeer herding, pet the animals, and feed them their favorite lichen.

name: Husky Sledding
description: A high-adrenaline, unforgettable experience driving your own team of eager, howling husky dogs through the frozen Lapland wilderness.

name: Arctic SnowHotel
description: A massive hotel carved entirely out of ice and snow every single winter. Features stunning ice sculptures, an ice restaurant, and an ice chapel.

name: Rent a Snow Glider
description: Rent a traditional Finnish kick-sled (snow glider) or plastic toboggan to slide down the snowy hills or navigate the flat, frozen river.

name: Korouoma Canyon
description: A rugged nature reserve an hour from the city. Famous for an incredible winter hiking trail that takes you past massive, spectacular frozen waterfalls.

name: Ranua Zoo
description: The northernmost zoo in the world. Walk along a wooden boardwalk through the forest to see Arctic foxes, wolverines, and the only polar bears in Finland.

name: Ice Fishing
description: Head out onto a completely frozen lake, drill a hole through thick ice with a hand auger, and wait patiently for a catch like a true local.

name: Snowmobiling
description: Suit up in thermal gear and blast through snow-covered pine forests and over frozen rivers on a high-speed snowmobile safari.

name: Arctic Fantasy Park (SantaPark)
description: An indoor Christmas theme park built deep inside an underground cave network. Features an elf school, an ice gallery, and a magical train ride.

name: Hike to Ounasvaara Observation Tower
description: A brisk winter hike up the Ounasvaara fell right next to the city. Climb the wooden observation tower for sweeping, beautiful views of the frozen landscape.

name: Angry Birds Playground
description: A brightly colored, public playground right by the river themed entirely around the Finnish mobile game Angry Birds. Great for letting kids burn off energy.

name: Lumberjack's Candle Bridge
description: The iconic bridge connecting the city over the Kemijoki river. Its striking design pays homage to the region's logging history and lights up beautifully at night.

name: Ice Floating
description: Put on a buoyant, completely waterproof red rescue suit and float peacefully in freezing, ice-filled Arctic waters while gazing at the sky.

name: Icebreaker Cruise
description: Often booked from Rovaniemi, this epic day trip takes you to the coast to board a massive icebreaker ship. Feel the sheer power of the ship crushing thick sea ice.

name: Ice Bar in Snowman World
description: A truly Arctic drinking experience. The walls, the bar, and even the glasses you drink your vodka shots from are carved entirely out of pure ice.
